title: FOI2025-00257: Records of interactions with ChatGPT
body: "   Reference number FOI2025-00257   Date of request 29 March 2025   Date of response 10 April 2025   Outcome Request refused     The Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (the department) received the following request for information which we responded to under the Freedom of Information Act 2000 (FOIA):    I am requesting copies of any records of interactions with ChatGPT or other AI chatbot/LLM systems conducted by UK Government employees in the department of science, innovation and technology including but not limited to:    Chat logs, transcripts, or records of any interactions between staff and ChatGPT (or similar AI chatbots) that were conducted on government devices, accounts, or within official government work.   Metadata or documentation relating to ministerial use of ChatGPT, such as internal policies, email discussions, or briefings on its use by staff.   Dates and times of recorded interactions, if available.   Name and position of the involved person, where applicable.      "
